# ctyun_sdwans (Data Source)
-> 详细说明请见文档：https://www.ctyun.cn/document/10035786/10035852



## Example

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ctyun = {
      source = "ctyun-it/ctyun"
    }
  }
}

# 可参考index.md，在环境变量中配置ak、sk、资源池ID、可用区名称
provider "ctyun" {
  env = "prod"
}

data "ctyun_sdwans" "sdwan_test" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `project_id` (String) 企业项目ID，如果不填则默认使用provider ctyun中的project_id或环境变量中的CTYUN_PROJECT_ID
- `region_id` (String) 资源池ID，如果不填则默认使用provider ctyun中的region_id或环境变量中的CTYUN_REGION_ID
- `sdwan_id` (String) SD-WAN ID，用于精确查询

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) 数据源唯一标识
- `sdwans` (Attributes List) SD-WAN列表 (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sdwans))

<a id="nestedatt--sdwans"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sdwans`

Read-Only:

- `created_time` (String) 创建时间，为UTC格式
- `description` (String) SD-WAN描述
- `id` (String) SD-WAN ID
- `name` (String) SD-WAN名称
